Think of this as a decision tree. At each element in the array, you have two choices: either include the element in your current subset, or don't include it.
You can use backtracking (recursion) to explore all paths. Maintain a 'current' array. Push the element, recurse, pop the element, recurse again.
There are exactly 2^N possible subsets. Make sure to add a copy of your 'current' array to the result before returning from each branch.
